title: Concentration of Giardia supernatant proteins
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"cscf1","text":"This protocol provides an efficient and rapid way to concentrate proteins present in supernatants using Vivaspin columns (3,000 MWCO).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"dvg7g","text":"Prepare a 25 mM Ambic (Ammonium bicarbonate) solution:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7nore","text":"19.77 g Ambic in 10 ml Ultrapure H2O.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
